case_title: CLUB MINIBAR, INC. ATT.JAMES HOBBS, CFO VS WESTERN FLOORING CO. ATT.WILLIAM LAM,GENR/PARTNER.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CLUB MINIBAR, INC. ATT.JAMES HOBBS, CFO AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN FLOORING CO. ATT.WILLIAM LAM,GENR/PARTNER. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO WESTERN FLOORING CO RETURNED TO SENDER;
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN FLOORING CO. ATT.WILLIAM LAM,GENR/PARTNER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLUB MINIBAR, INC. ATT.JAMES HOBBS, CFO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN FLOORING CO. ATT.WILLIAM LAM,GENR/PARTNER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
